meta.siteTitle: CHIC — Wooden Expert | Custom Wood Products Manufacturer in China
meta.siteDescription: CHIC wooden expert — a leading custom wooden box manufacturer in China. Hinged, sliding, magnetic and locked boxes in paulownia, pine, bamboo, acacia and walnut.

footer.newsletterTitle: Get our catalog & new product updates
footer.brandBlurb: Xiamen Chic Homeware Co.,Ltd. is a custom wooden box manufacturer with our 15,000 m² factory in Cao County, Shandong and our sales & design office in Xiamen, Fujian. We help global brands and retailers in 60+ countries bring premium wooden packaging and storage products to market — at scale, with bench-grade craftsmanship.
footer.newsletterConsent: By subscribing, you agree to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>. We send 1-2 emails per month and you can unsubscribe anytime.

cookie.message: We use cookies to power our chat widget and to remember your language choice. See our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> for details.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Quick answers to the most common questions we get from B2B buyers — MOQ, lead time, payment terms, customization scope, and quality control.
faq.q1: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
faq.a1: Our standard MOQ is 200–500 pieces depending on product complexity. Simple SKUs can go as low as 100 pieces for a sample run; highly customized designs may need 500+ for cost-effective tooling.
faq.q2: What is the typical lead time?
faq.a2: 25–35 days from confirmed order and approved sample. Repeat orders without spec changes drop to 20–25 days. Express options are available for an additional fee.
faq.q3: Do you offer OEM / ODM services?
faq.a3: Yes. We design and produce custom wooden boxes from scratch based on your brief — wood species, dimensions, closure type, finish, hardware, lining, and branding. We can also reverse-engineer existing samples you provide.
faq.a4: Dimensions, closure type (hinged / sliding / drawer / magnetic / lock / open), wood species, surface finish (oil / lacquer / paint / stain / torched), hardware (brass / steel / matte black), interior lining (felt / velvet / EVA foam), and branding (laser engrave / hot foil / screen print / debossing / brass plate).
faq.q5: How do you handle quality control?
faq.a5: Multi-stage QC: incoming material inspection, in-process checks at routing / sanding / finishing / assembly, and final pre-shipment inspection by AQL 2.5 standard. Third-party inspection (SGS / BV / Intertek) is available before shipment on request.
faq.a6: 30% deposit on order confirmation, 70% before shipment by T/T. New customers may require a higher deposit on the first order. We also accept L/C at sight for orders over USD 30,000.
faq.a7: Yes — we export to 60+ countries. Shipping is by FCL, LCL, or air express depending on volume and urgency. We handle all export documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, phytosanitary certificate, and fumigation as required.

productDetail.inquiryDescription: Send us your specs — quantity, dimensions, branding, and any custom requirements. We respond within 24 hours with a quote and lead time confirmation.

productTabs.descriptionBoilerplate: All boxes are built to your specifications — wood species, dimensions, finish, hardware, lining, and branding can all be customized for your project. Sample available within 7 days of confirmed quote.
productTabs.packagingBoilerplate: We handle all export documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, phytosanitary certificate (for solid wood), and fumigation as required. Shipping by FCL, LCL, or air express depending on volume and urgency.

materialGuideHowto.title: How to Choose Your Wooden Box
materialGuideHowto.sub: A 6-step buyer flow — from defining your use case to confirming production. Most B2B buyers cycle through these in order before requesting samples.
materialGuideHowto.step1Body: Define what the box will hold and how it will be used — retail packaging, premium gifting, storage, display, or shipping. Use case drives weight, durability, and finish requirements.
materialGuideHowto.step2Body: Match aesthetic and budget: paulownia (lightest, best freight cost), pine (clean grain, paint-friendly), bamboo (sustainable, modern), acacia (rich grain, mid-range), walnut (premium chocolate hardwood).
materialGuideHowto.step3Body: Hinged for everyday opening; magnetic for premium clean look; sliding for hardware-free freight savings; drawer for organized access; lock for secure storage; open top for display.
materialGuideHowto.step4Body: Choose between natural oil (food-safe, warmest tone), matte lacquer (clean modern), painted (color flexibility), stained (richer color), or torched (rustic). Each affects feel, durability, and brandability.
materialGuideHowto.step5Body: Laser engraving for permanence and fine detail; hot foil for luxury feel; screen print for color; debossing for premium texture; brass nameplate for jewelry-grade products.
materialGuideHowto.step6Body: Match MOQ to your sales velocity (typical 200–500 for our line); plan 25–35 days from confirmed sample. Order samples first if it is a new design.

faq.title: Buyer FAQ
faq.sub: The questions we get most often. Don't see your answer? Email us — we'll add it to this list.
faq.a1: For ODM products from our existing catalog, our typical MOQ is 200-300 pieces. For sample runs we can go as low as 100 pieces. For full custom OEM projects, MOQ is usually 500-1,000 pieces — the higher MOQ helps justify the tooling and setup costs. We're flexible on this for first-time buyers; just ask.
faq.q2: How long is the lead time?
faq.a2: Sampling takes 7-15 days depending on complexity. Production lead time is typically 18-28 days for ODM and 35-55 days for full OEM. Q4 (October-December) we recommend ordering early — Amazon FBA receiving queues get congested, and our production fills up faster. For urgent projects we can sometimes air-freight initial inventory.
faq.q3: Do you provide samples? Are they free?
faq.a3: We provide samples for all serious inquiries. Single hand-built samples are typically $30-100 each (refunded against your first production order if you proceed). For 100-piece production trial runs (which we strongly recommend before scaling), pricing is typically 30-60% above full-volume per-unit cost.
faq.a4: Standard terms for established relationships: 30% deposit at order confirmation, 70% balance before shipment. For first-time orders we may request 50/50. We accept T/T (bank transfer), PayPal for small samples, and Alibaba Trade Assurance (escrow) for first-time buyers who prefer protected payment.
faq.q5: What woods and finishes do you offer?
faq.a5: We work with paulownia, pine, bamboo, acacia, walnut, oak, and several specialty hardwoods. Finishes include food-safe lacquer, water-based low-VOC lacquer, oil/wax (tung, beeswax, mineral oil), painted (matte and gloss), and custom stains. All finishes available with REACH and CARB Phase 2 compliance documentation.
faq.q6: Can I customize size, branding, and hardware?
faq.a6: Yes — full customization is what we do. Custom dimensions, wood species, finishes, hinge/lock/magnet hardware, lining material, and branding (laser engrave, hot foil, deboss, screen print). Send your spec or a reference image and we'll come back with a 3D mockup and quote.
faq.q7: Do you handle international shipping and customs?
faq.a7: Yes. We ship FOB (Xiamen or Shanghai port), CIF, or DDP. We handle phytosanitary certificates for all solid wood, certificate of origin, commercial invoice, packing list, and ISF filing for US-bound containers. We work with both LCL (less-than-container) and FCL (full container) freight, depending on volume.
faq.a8: Absolutely — we welcome buyer visits and will help arrange airport pickup from Xiamen or Heze. Our 15,000 m² facility in Cao County is a 45-minute drive from Heze airport. The Xiamen sales office is 10 minutes from Xiamen Gaoqi International Airport. Email us at info@xmchichomeware.com to plan a visit.

final.sub: Email, WhatsApp, or the form above. The more detail you share (dimensions, quantity, target price, timeline), the more useful our first reply will be.
